content:
✔ Represents an overarching psychological force at play.
✔ Ties to myth, symbolism, and character development.
✔ Influences weekly themes & skill check advantages.

Example: Week 8 – The Dystopian Mind

📜 Psychological Charge: The Shadow
✔ Represents repressed fears, hidden truths, & moral dilemmas.
✔ Encourages students to explore the “dark side” of utopian ideals.
✔ Rewards students who engage in difficult, uncomfortable discussions.

📜 Archetype-Based Bonus
✔ If a student writes from the perspective of an antihero or dystopian villain, they gain a one-time XP multiplier.
✔ If a student engages in a Socratic debate questioning their own viewpoint, they can reroll a failed assignment.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 186 (chunk 186/555)
